[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Sophia auto-advance feature — implemented PR1-PR3 + convention doc
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  Implemented the full Sophia auto-advance feature (lets her run a handoff plan's PRs without a human prompt between each, pausing at explicit Advance-column gates) across 3 stacked PRs, all tests passing, all behind the AUTO_ADVANCE flag (default off). PR1 (#244): pure resume-tracker parser app/auto_advance.py (parse tracker / find RESUME HERE / classify auto|gate / next_action), fails closed to gate, 22 unit tests. PR2 (#245): brain emits the advance signal at turn-end (config AUTO_ADVANCE + AUTO_ADVANCE_MAX_TURNS, _extract_plan_file, _compute_advance_signal using open_fix_pr as the unit-completed signal), injected into the /chat done event + /chat-blocking response, 7 tests. PR3 (#246): adapter _run_turn_with_auto_advance loop — continue on auto with heartbeat, pause report on gate, plan-complete on done, consecutive-turn cap, governor-interrupt; call_chat_with_progress advance_out box; 6 tests. agentic#545 (merged): OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS §5c documenting the Advance-column convention. Full suite 568 pass (1 pre-existing unrelated vault_system_status failure). Own-repo gate: PRs opened for human merge + deploy + UAT (U1-U6), not self-merged.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
